hooks.command: bash "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/fast_gate.sh" .bib hooks/validate_bib_write.py || echo '{"systemMessage": "PhilLit: .bib write-time validation could not run (uv failure) - the write was allowed unvalidated."}'

bash "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/fast_gate.sh" run_in_background hooks/block_background_bash.py || echo '{"systemMessage": "PhilLit: background-bash gate could not run (uv failure) - the call was allowed."}'

bash "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/fast_gate.sh" .bib hooks/validate_bib_write.py || echo '{"systemMessage": "PhilLit: post-edit .bib validation could not run (uv failure) - the edit was not validated."}'
